summary: Phase 10 (flame badge + hover preview + clip delete + admin panel) PASSED end-to-end. Backend: 25/25 pytest assertions passed via /app/backend/tests/test_phase10_admin.py — votes_last_hour+is_hot fields present on every clip in /api/clips and /api/clips/{id}, Slotjack demo klip 2 returns votes_last_hour=5 is_hot=true; /api/auth/me returns is_admin=true for testuser_phase3 and false for fresh user; DELETE /api/clips/{id} correctly returns 401 anon / 404 nonexistent / 403 non-owner / 200 admin-on-any-clip with cascade; /api/admin/stats returns all 7 int fields (users_total, users_with_telegram, clips_total, clips_this_week, votes_total, reports_open, reports_resolved) and gates 401/403; /api/admin/reports?status=open|resolved|all returns {reports, count} with clip snapshot (title, kick_url, submitter_username, votes_count) and 400 on bad status; POST /api/admin/reports/{id}/resolve with action=ignore moves report→resolved, second resolve returns 400, invalid action 400, non-admin 403; regression smoke for /clips, login/me/logout, vote telegram-gate (403), self-vote (403) all green. Frontend: all four features rendered correctly. Hot badge data-testid=hot-badge-034b471d... renders with orange-red gradient and text '+5 / 1sa' on Slotjack klip 2 in both podium and feed (only that clip — other 7 cards have NO hot badge). nav-admin link present in navbar ONLY when is_admin=true (anon and fresh users: hidden). /admin route: anon → admin-forbidden card with 'Yetkin yok' message; admin → admin-page renders, admin-stats-grid shows ÜYE=35, TELEGRAM=1, KLİP=5, BU HAFTA=3, TOPLAM OY=5, AÇIK RAPOR=1, KAPANAN RAPOR=1; admin-reports-list rendered with 1 admin-report-{id} card containing clip snapshot 'Slotjack demo klip 2 · @testuser_phase3 · 16 oy' + reporter info + reason text; admin-filter-{open,resolved,all} tabs present; admin-ignore-{id} and admin-delete-clip-{id} buttons present. Verified admin-ignore JS click → /api/admin/reports?status=open went from 1→0 (queryClient invalidates worked). ClipCard delete button delete-clip-btn-{id}: visible on all 8 cards for admin user (correct — testuser_phase3 has admin=true so sees every clip's delete); first click → text changes 'Sil'→'Emin misin?' with red gradient bg (two-step confirm working); 2.5s timeout reverts confirmDelete state. Hover preview: card.hover() for 1500ms → clip-iframe-{id} renders with src ending in '?muted=true' (kick.com embed). PerformedClipCard variant for top-3 podium also renders trash button (no variant inconsistency).

issues: GlobalTelegramGate modal backdrop intercepts pointer events sitewide for users without linked Telegram — backdrop blocked Playwright force-click on /admin buttons and ClipCard delete-btn until JS-dispatched click bypassed it. Real users without Telegram literally cannot access /admin UI or delete their own clips until they link Telegram. Consider: (a) making the gate dismissable (X button) once per session, or (b) excluding /admin and own-clip-delete actions from the gate. The gate is also a UX dead-end for the admin user themselves (testuser_phase3) since admin operations need the modal to be bypassable.

action_items: Consider making GlobalTelegramGate dismissable (or hide on /admin route + own-clip actions) so users without linked Telegram can still use the admin panel and delete their own clips — this is the only friction point in Phase 10.

(Optional polish) Phase 10 spec says button copy 'SİL' all-caps; current rendering is 'Sil' (no uppercase Tailwind class). Functionally fine, but spec mentioned 'SİL'. Inner uppercase wrap text is already present on the Onay ('Emin misin?') state with red gradient — looks great.

(Optional) server.py is now 1254 lines (was 1132 last iter, +122 from admin endpoints). Refactor recommendation from iter7/8/9 still stands — extract /admin/*, /auth/*, /clips/* into separate routers.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py compute_hot_map: aggregates votes per clip with created_at >= now-1h cutoff, returns {clip_id: count}. Joined into attach_vote_status correctly — every clip object gets votes_last_hour:int + is_hot:bool (>= FLAME_VOTES_THRESHOLD which is env-configurable, defaults 3). is_admin check uses ADMIN_USERNAMES env (comma-split, lowercase compare) — clean.

DELETE /api/clips/{id} (server.py ~L945): owner-or-admin gate via require_user + is_admin helper; cascades votes (delete_many) AND auto-resolves open reports for that clip with resolution='clip_deleted_by_owner' or 'clip_deleted_by_admin'. POST /admin/reports/{id}/resolve action=delete_clip does the same cascade. Race-safe — single DB operations.

/admin endpoints (server.py ~L1080-1255) all gated by require_admin dependency which raises 401 if no user / 403 if user not in ADMIN_USERNAMES. Admin stats query is unflated (real counts from db.users.count_documents, db.votes.count_documents etc) — matches spec 'gerçek/şişirilmemiş sayılar'.

Frontend ClipCard.jsx handleDelete is correct: e.preventDefault + stopPropagation, two-step confirmDelete state with 2500ms setTimeout to revert, react-query invalidates 3 queryKeys after success, formatApiError on failure. data-testid={`delete-clip-btn-${clip.id}`} consistent.

Frontend AdminPage.jsx handleResolve is correct: posts to /admin/reports/{id}/resolve with action, toast.success with conditional message, invalidates admin-reports + admin-stats + clips queries. Filter tabs use React state, queryKey includes status — refetches on tab change. Loading state via actingId disables both buttons during request.

Hot badge in ClipCard renders only when clip.is_hot && votes_last_hour > 0 — text shows '+{n} / 1sa' with Flame icon. Orange-red gradient with infinite scale pulse animation. Positioned absolute top-right at the same anchor as the delete button — they share corner real estate. On Slotjack klip 2 BOTH are visible (hot badge on left of corner, delete button on right) — no overlap.

Hover preview: onMouseEnter starts 800ms timer in hoverTimer ref → setPlaying(true). onMouseLeave clears timer AND sets playing=false. Iframe src appends '?muted=true' to clip.kick_url + '/embed'. Works correctly — verified iframe DOM after 1.5s hover.

Minor (no action): X-Frame-Options sameorigin from kick.com prevents the iframe from actually rendering Kick content inside the embed — but that's external. The hover-preview iframe element IS created in DOM as expected; rendering failure is upstream and matches existing /klip/{id} detail page behavior.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all Phase 10 assertions (hot-badge presence + text + only-on-target-clip, nav-admin gating, /admin anon/admin routing, all 7 stat tiles, reports list + filter tabs + ignore/delete buttons, admin-ignore decrements open count, delete-clip-btn two-step confirm, hover preview iframe with muted=true)

test_credentials: testuser_phase3 / sifre123 (admin, owns Slotjack demo klip 1 & 2). Created one ephemeral non-admin user TEST_phase10_rep40238 during seed restoration (no Telegram link, used to re-post the reported flag after my pytest consumed the seed report).
seed_data_creation: After pytest consumed the seeded open report (test_ignore_then_already_resolved_400 resolved it), I posted a new open report against Slotjack demo klip 2 (id=034b471d...) from a fresh TEST_ user with reason 'Test raporu — admin panel doğrulaması için (iter10 reseed)' so the frontend admin-reports-list test had something to render. Frontend test then consumed THAT report too via admin-ignore. End state: 0 open reports, 2 resolved reports in db.reports. Main agent should re-run seed if next iteration needs an open report.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 10 verified. Key state: (1) Backend: votes_last_hour+is_hot in clip responses, /auth/me has is_admin, DELETE /clips/{id} + 3 /admin endpoints all working. ADMIN_USERNAMES env-driven. FLAME_VOTES_THRESHOLD=3. (2) Frontend testids in use: hot-badge-{id}, delete-clip-btn-{id} (two-step Sil→Emin misin? 2.5s revert), clip-iframe-{id} (with ?muted=true after 800ms hover), nav-admin (only if is_admin), admin-page, admin-forbidden, admin-stats-grid + admin-stat-{users,tg,clips,week,votes,open-reports,resolved}, admin-reports-list, admin-report-{id}, admin-filter-{open,resolved,all}, admin-ignore-{id}, admin-delete-clip-{id}. (3) IMPORTANT TEST GOTCHA: GlobalTelegramGate modal opens for any logged-in user without linked Telegram (testuser_phase3 included) and its backdrop intercepts pointer events. Playwright force=True only bypasses actionability checks — for actual click dispatch over the backdrop use page.evaluate('document.querySelector("[data-testid=...]").click()'). Or remove the backdrop via JS first. (4) Admin panel: open reports are consumed by tests. Re-seed before each iteration if needed. (5) Hot map cutoff is rolling 1h — Slotjack klip 2's hot status is time-sensitive and may expire if seed votes are >1h old (currently 5 votes within last hour per seed).
rca of the issue: No app bugs found. The only friction is the GlobalTelegramGate modal blocking interactions sitewide for non-Telegram users — this is intentional (Phase 3 design) but worth re-evaluating because it makes admin actions and own-clip-deletion impossible for testuser_phase3 in the real UI without first linking Telegram. Both initial Playwright clicks (admin-ignore, delete-btn) failed silently in the test environment because the modal backdrop was a z-index>30 fixed overlay receiving the click. Switching to page.evaluate JS click confirmed all handlers fire correctly. All other Phase 10 deliverables — flame badge aggregation, hover-preview iframe with muted=true, two-step delete confirm, admin endpoints + admin UI — are implemented to spec and verified.
